summarization.a: The chart shows a linear relationship between the number of cycles and the amount of blanket TiO2 etched (in nm), indicating a consistent increase with each cycle.

data_extraction.a:
| Number of cycles | blanket TiO2 etched amount (nm) |
|---|---|
| 0 | 0 |
| 1 | 0.69 |
| 4 | 2.89 |
| 8 | 5.66 |
| 12 | 8.65 |

a.question: Why does the error bar size change over cycles?
Does the figure show evidence of incubation period?
What is the etching rate per cycle, derived from looking at the last data point?
Does the etching process speed up, slow down, or stay at roughly the same speed as cycle number increases?
a.answer: It stays at approximately the same speed.
